pokemon:caterpie.name: Caterpie
pokemon:caterpie.summary: Caterpie has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this Pokémon releases a terrifically strong odor.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Caterpie has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this Pokémon releases a terrifically strong odor.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
It crawls into foliage where it camouflages itself among leaves that are the same color as its body.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
Its voracious appetite compels it to devour leaves bigger than itself without hesitation. It releases a terribly strong odor from its antennae.
It is covered with a green skin. When it grows, it sheds the skin, covers itself with silk, and becomes a cocoon.
For protection, it releases a horri­ ble stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies.
For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.
Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
If you touch the feeler on top of its head, it will release a horrible stink to protect itself.
If you touch the feeler on top of its head, it will release a horrible stink to protect itself.
It’s easy to catch, and it grows quickly, making it one of the top recommendations for novice Pokémon Trainers.
Caterpie has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this Pokémon releases a terrifically strong odor.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
CATERPIE has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this POKéMON releases a terrifically strong odor.
CATERPIE has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this POKéMON releases a terrifically strong odor.
Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.
Its feet have suction cups designed to stick to any surface. It tenaciously climbs trees to forage.
Its feet have suction cups designed to stick to any surface. It tenaciously climbs trees to forage.
When attacked by bird Pokémon, it resists by releasing a terrifically strong odor from its antennae, but it often becomes their prey.
For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies.
Its body is soft and weak. In nature, its perpetual fate is to be seen by others as food.
Perhaps because it would like to grow up quickly, it has a voracious appetite, eating a hundred leaves a day.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
It releases a stench from its red antenna to repel enemies. It grows by molting repeatedly.
For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.
Its feet have suction cups designed to stick to any surface. It tenaciously climbs trees to forage.
If you touch the feeler on top of its head, it will release a horrible stink to protect itself.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Caterpie has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this Pokémon releases a terrifically strong odor.

pokemon:metapod.name: Metapod
pokemon:metapod.summary: The shell covering this Pokémon’s body is as hard as an iron slab. Metapod does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The shell covering this Pokémon’s body is as hard as an iron slab. Metapod does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
This is its pre- evolved form. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
Its shell is as hard as an iron slab. A METAPOD does not move very much because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the shell.
Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can’t withstand a harsh attack.
Inside the shell, it is soft and weak as it pre­ pares to evolve. It stays motion­ less in the shell.
Inside the shell, it is soft and weak as it prepares to evolve. It stays motionless in the shell.
This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
Hardens its shell to protect itself. However, a large impact may cause it to pop out of its shell.
Hardens its shell to protect itself. However, a large impact may cause it to pop out of its shell.
Its shell is hard, but it’s still just a bug shell. It’s been known to break, so intense battles with it should be avoided.
The shell covering this Pokémon’s body is as hard as an iron slab. Metapod does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
The shell covering this POKéMON’s body is as hard as an iron slab. METAPOD does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
The shell covering this POKéMON’s body is as hard as an iron slab. METAPOD does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell.
Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can’t withstand a harsh attack.
It prepares for evolution by har­ dening its shell as much as possi­ ble to protect its soft body.
It prepares for evolution by hardening its shell as much as possible to protect its soft body.
Its shell is filled with its soft innards. It doesn’t move much because of the risk it might carelessly spill its innards out.
It is waiting for the moment to evolve. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack.
Its hard shell doesn’t crack a bit even if Pikipek pecks at it, but it will tip over, spilling out its insides.
Its shell is filled with a thick liquid. All of the cells throughout its body are being rebuilt in preparation for evolution.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
This Pokémon is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.
Hardens its shell to protect itself. However, a large impact may cause it to pop out of its shell.

pokemon:butterfree.name: Butterfree
pokemon:butterfree.summary: Butterfree has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Butterfree has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
It flits from flower to flower, collecting honey. It can even identify distant flowers in bloom.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
It has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can seek, extract, and carry honey from flowers blooming over six miles away.
The wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this POKéMON can fly about even in rain.
It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.
It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.
In battle, it flaps its wings at great speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
Its wings, covered with poisonous powder, repel water. This allows it to fly in the rain.
Its wings, covered with poisonous powder, repel water. This allows it to fly in the rain.
When attacked by other Pokémon, it defends itself by scattering its poisonous scales and fluttering its wings.
Butterfree has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
BUTTERFREE has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
BUTTERFREE has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest.
It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest.
Water-repellent powder on its wings enables it to collect honey, even in the heav­ iest of rains.
Water-repellent powder on its wings enables it to collect honey, even in the heaviest of rains.
Close examination of its large eyes reveals that each eye is composed of a myriad of tiny eyes.
In battle, it flaps its wings at great speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.
Nectar from pretty flowers is its favorite food. In fields of flowers, it has heated battles with Cutiefly for territory.
Its wings are covered in toxic scales. If it finds bird Pokémon going after Caterpie, Butterfree sprinkles its scales on them to drive them off.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.
The wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this Pokémon can fly about even in rain.
Its wings, covered with poisonous powders, repel water. This allows it to fly in the rain.
